prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第65名持续上升至2026年第5 7名，近年排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强；2025年声誉评价偏负面（教授考核争议事件），但2026年声誉数据中无该校明显负面信号；抖音热度排名第7 3、评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度中等；历史未见明显投档断档记录；法学（A）、应用经济学（A-），财经政法类顶尖学科；计算机类、统计学类等理工专业 虽无A类学科评估，但依托学校整体平台，报考热度尚可。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类社会热度高热推荐，电子信息/通信高热推荐，法学分化观望，金融/财经/经济分化观 望；本省2026年物理类考生约146529人（按近年67%占比估算），较2025年121443人增加约20.6%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；中南 财经政法大学位于湖北武汉，对甘肃考生属跨省报考，无显著地域偏好加成；该校在甘肃招生占比约1.2%–2.2%，属常规外省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2023–2025年位次稳 定在1.1–1.4万区间、2026年计划大幅扩招（+37.8%）缓解竞争、本省物理类考生增加（+20.6%）加剧竞争，以及学校软科排名持续上升的利好，扩招效应略大于考生增加效应， 预计2026年理科组最低位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约13691名，区间13191–14191名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 5069 → 33863 → 13725 → 10779 → 11185, showing significant fluctuations; an abnormal gap occurred in 2022 (33863), with gradual recovery and stabilization in the 10779–13725 range from 2023 to 2025; the 2025 baseline is approximately 11185; the science group enrollment plan was stable at 39 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 42 in 2024, and to 45 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 62, an increase of 17 (+37.8%) from 2025, marking three consecutive years of expansion with a notable magnitude, theoretically easing competition and increasing ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength; the 2025 reputation evaluation was slightly negative (professor assessment controversy), but no significant negative signals appear in 2026 reputation data; Douyin popularity ranks 73rd with a 'general' rating, indicating moderate short-video platform exposure; no historical record of significant admission gaps; top-tier disciplines include Law (A) and Applied Economics (A-), with finance and law as leading fields; while Computer Science and Statistics lack A-level evaluations, they benefit from the university's overall platform and maintain moderate application popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science has high social heat and is recommended, Electronics/Communication is highly recommended, Law is divided and watched, Finance/Economics is divided and watched; the province's 2026 physics category examinees are approximately 146,529 (estimated at 67% of total), an increase of about 20.6% from 121,443 in 2025, intensifying competition; Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and for Gansu examinees it is an out-of-province application with no significant regional preference advantage; its enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 1.2%–2.2%, a typical scale for out-of-province universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable ranking in the 1.1–1.4 thousand range from 2023 to 2025, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+37.8%) easing competition, the increase in provincial physics examinees (+20.6%) intensifying competition, and the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the examinee increase effect; the 2026 science group minimum ranking is expected to shift slightly downward compared to 2025; predicted minimum ranking approximately 13691, with a range of 13191–14191.

- Finance (Applied Economics A-; Social Heat: High Heat Recommended).

- Public Finance (Applied Economics A-; Social Heat: Divided and Watch)
- Economics (Applied Economics A-; Social Heat: Divided and Watch)
- Investment (Applied Economics A-; Social Heat: Divided and Watch).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (13191–14191), focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if your ranking is better than the upper limit (<13191), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Law, Accounting, and Computer Science; if your ranking is near the lower limit (>14191), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors and be cautious with popular Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group fluctuated significantly: approximately 860 → 1512 → 1313 → 1753 → 905. In 2025, the ranking moved sharply forward to 905, an increase of about 848 places compared to 2024, indicating a notable rebound in application popularity. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plan for the liberal arts group remained stable at 31–32 students. In 2026, the plan significantly expanded to 43 students, an increase of 11 students (+34.4%) compared to 2025. This substantial expansion theoretically eases competition slightly, leading to a tendency for ranking numbers to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, reflecting the university's growing comprehensive strength. In 2025, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (due to a professor assessment controversy), but in 2026, no significant negative signals were found for this university. Douyin popularity ranking is 73rd, with an average evaluation, indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms. Historically, no obvious admission gaps have been recorded.
5. [Advantage Disciplines] Law (A in the fifth round of discipline evaluation), Applied Economics (A-), both top-tier disciplines in finance, economics, and law, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively high social popularity (recommended); finance/accounting/economics are differentiated and under observation. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in this province is approximately 72,171 (estimated based on about 33% of total candidates in recent years), an increase of about 23.7% compared to 58,374 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the larger candidate pool. Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and for Gansu candidates, it is a cross-province application with no significant regional preference advantage. The university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 1.2%–2.2%, which is a typical scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong rebound in 2025 rankings moving significantly forward, the substantial enrollment expansion in 2026 (+34.4%) easing competition, the increase in history category candidates in this province (+23.7%) intensifying competition, and the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking as a positive factor, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase effect. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group in 2026 will move slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1,072, with a range of 879–1,265.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (879–1,265), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is better than the upper limit of the range (<879), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Law and Accounting. If your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>1,265), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3 majors and cautiously sprint.
